ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code representing the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the state */,
  "avg_income" REAL /* Average income per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the production occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the production data */,
  "numcol" INTEGER /* Number of columns (farms or fields) */,
  "yieldpercol" REAL /* Yield per column (in pounds) */,
  "totalprod" REAL /* Total production (in pounds) */,
  "stocks" REAL /* Stock levels (in pounds) */,
  "priceperlb" REAL /* Price per pound (in USD) */,
  "prodvalue" REAL /* Total production value (in USD) */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "production_method" TEXT /* Method of production */,
  "fertilizer_used" TEXT /* Type and amount of fertilizer used */,
  "pesticide_used" TEXT /* Type and amount of pesticide used */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation */,
  "harvest_method" TEXT /* Method of harvest */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_production_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_production_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop */,
  "growing_season" TEXT /* Growing season of the commodity */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage requirements for the commodity */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Average market value of the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agency staff, researcher, external stakeholder) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the production record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the production record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES agricultural_production ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES agricultural_production ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production record */,
  "key" TEXT /* Metadata key */,
  "value" TEXT /* Metadata value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES agricultural_production ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_map" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each production record
